case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. KAVEH DOROUDI ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100054717) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-07-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100091725) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $380.90 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100091725) AS TO DEFENDANT DOROUDI, KAVEH
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033 B (A) (TRANSACTION ID # 100091725) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEY (TRANSACTION ID # 100091725) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100056893), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED DEC-14-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOROUDI, KAVEH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOROUDI, KAVEH $7,074.16 PRINCIPAL, $380.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,455.06, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100091725)

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT DOROUDI, KAVEH DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-20-2019
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-07-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
